title: Fibonacci (iterative)
prompt: Write fibonacci(n) returning the nth Fibonacci number, 0-indexed: fibonacci(0)=0, fibonacci(1)=1.

details.restate: Give back the nth Fibonacci number, counting from 0: the sequence starts 0, 1, and every later number is the sum of the two before it (0, 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, ...).

io.because: the sequence's first entry, at position 0

terms.meaning: positions count from 0, so fibonacci(0) is the very first entry
